title: What would the cast look like in 10 years
display_title: What would the cast look like in 10 years
wikitext:
[]: What would the cast look like in 10 years? Post by CyberXIII » Sun Apr 25, 2010 2:25 pm Topic. What would the children look like if they had lived to adulthood? What would the adults look like in 10 years?

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Apr 25, 2010 2:35 pm They would look older.

[]: Post by SenorSquiid » Sun Apr 25, 2010 2:38 pm Shinji would look pretty much like Gendo in Episode 21.

[]: Post by Allemann » Sun Apr 25, 2010 3:37 pm Rei would look like Yui. Shinji like Gendo with Yui's face transplant.

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Apr 25, 2010 3:51 pm Allemann wrote: Shinji like Gendo with Yui's face transplant.

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:03 pm Damn. I thought I saw Rei (when she is older) as a scientist somewhere on the internet. But yeah, she could end up being a scientist. Or a Theologist. Shinji: like SenorSquiid says, like Gendo in Episode 21. Asuka: Yep.

[]: Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:06 pm ^ So what you're saying is, that after ten years of shit, she would still look like a gothic loli? I approve.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:09 pm Xard wrote: That kid inherited all the good genes didn't he?

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:11 pm ran1 wrote: ^ So what you're saying is, that after ten years of shit, she would still look like a gothic loli? I approve.

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:21 pm ran1 wrote: ^ So what you're saying is, that after ten years of shit, she would still look like a gothic loli? I approve.

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:51 pm Finally I was waiting for that

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:51 pm You're welcome. It was inevitable.

[]: Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 4:54 pm It seems that 10 years later, Rei never grew out of enjoying the nude. That's probably why Gainax loves her so much.

[]: Post by Xeroko » Sun Apr 25, 2010 5:03 pm ran1 wrote: It seems that 10 years later, Rei never grew out of enjoying the nude. That's probably why Gainax loves her so much.

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 5:04 pm BrikHaus, now that is THE definitive images of them 10 years older.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 25, 2010 5:14 pm ^More like 4-5. There's the fan art for the Japanese fanfic Stray Cat which shows a scarely aged a day Ritsuko molesting 20-something Asuka.

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sun Apr 25, 2010 5:19 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ^More like 4-5. There's the fan art for the Japanese fanfic Stray Cat which shows a scarely aged a day Ritsuko molesting 20-something Asuka.

[]: Post by kirri » Sun Apr 25, 2010 5:29 pm I think Asuka and Rei would look the same, maybe slightly taller. Here is an interpretation of what Shinji would like as an adult (don't know who the artist is):
